# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
  - name: staging-postgres-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
    properties:
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
      settings:
        tier: db-custom-1-3840
        ipConfiguration:
          ipv4Enabled: true
          authorizedNetworks:
            - name: allow-all
              value: 10.0.0.0/8
        backupConfiguration:
          enabled: true
          startTime: "03:00"
        availabilityType: ZONAL
        activationPolicy: ALWAYS
        storageAutoResize: true
        dataDiskType: PD_SSD
        dataDiskSizeGb: 20
      rootPassword: $(ref.sql-root-password.value)

  - name: sql-root-password
    type: gcp-types/secretmanager-v1:projects.secrets.versions.access
    properties:
      name: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/secrets/sql-root-password/versions/latest

outputs:
  - name: instanceConnectionName
    value: $(ref.staging-postgres-instance.connectionName)
